name: Lawry's Mexican Lasagna
recipeIngredient: 1/2 teaspoon seasoned salt, or more to taste
1 cup diced tomatoes, fresh or canned
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook ground beef in a large skillet over medium heat until browned and cooked through, about 8 minutes. Drain off fat.
2. Add taco seasoning mix, seasoned salt, tomatoes, tomato sauce, and chiles. Mix well and bring to a boil. Reduce heat and simmer, uncovered, for 10 minutes.
3. Combine ricotta cheese and eggs in a small bowl.
4. Spread half of the meat mixture in a 13x9-inch baking dish. Place five tortillas over the meat mixture. Spread half of the ricotta cheese mixture over the tortillas and sprinkle with half of the jack cheese.
5. Repeat layers with remaining ingredients.
6. Bake uncovered at 350 degrees until cheese is melted and lightly browned, about 20 to 30 minutes. Let stand 10 minutes before cutting into squares for serving. (Serves 6 to 8)
